pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh EDDX_PATH variable which expects the agent to save the editable file at this location.
Confirmed via export_result.sh PNG_PATH variable which expects the agent to export the image at this location.
Confirmed via verifier.py which iterates through these exact labels and checks if their lower-cased substrings exist in the XML content of the .eddx zip archive.

Analyzed verifier.py and export_result.sh. Although export_result.sh records the file sizes in bytes, verifier.py only checks boolean flags (e.g., eddx_exists) and does not enforce any minimum file size. Thus, the minimum file size claim is not actually evaluated.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to synthetically create an event map from scratch in Wondershare EdrawMax. The output paths for both the editable document (/home/ga/Documents/event_map.eddx) and the image export (/home/ga/Documents/event_map.png) strictly match the verification scripts. The verifier accurately expects the text labels 'Main Street', 'Oak Avenue', 'Convention Center', 'Parking', and 'Entrance' within the .eddx file's internal XMLs. However, the metadata claim requiring a minimum file size of 5 KB is contradicted, as verifier.py does not evaluate file sizes.
